symbols.name: Window_tilemap_buffer
symbols.description: tilemap word array built by window drawing routines (DMA source)

symbols.name: Window_text_scratch
symbols.description: text-tile scratch area used during window rendering

symbols.name: Tile_gfx_buffer
symbols.description: general-purpose decompressed tile graphics staging area

symbols.name: Enemy_gfx_buffer
symbols.description: decompressed enemy tile graphics staging area

symbols.name: Vblank_flag
symbols.description: set to $FF by VBlank ISR each frame; cleared by WaitForVBlank spin-loop

symbols.name: Vdp_dma_ram_routine
symbols.description: self-modifying DMA trampoline code copied to RAM at init

symbols.name: Text_build_buffer
symbols.description: scratch buffer for assembling formatted text strings before display

symbols.name: Sound_queue_buffer
symbols.description: ring buffer of pending sound/music command bytes (up to 4 entries)

symbols.name: DebugMenu_in_submenu
symbols.description: non-zero while inside a sound-test sub-menu

symbols.name: DebugMenu_scroll_pos
symbols.description: current horizontal scroll counter (−8..+8)

symbols.name: DebugMenu_selected_item
symbols.description: currently highlighted main-menu item (0-based)

symbols.name: DebugMenu_vdp_cursor
symbols.description: cached VDP write-address register value

symbols.name: DebugMenu_sound_item
symbols.description: currently highlighted sound-test entry (0-based)

symbols.name: DebugMenu_sound_category
symbols.description: selected sound category (0=BGM, 1=Effect, 2=BGM2, 3=D/A)

symbols.name: HScroll_run_table
symbols.description: per-line HScroll values (run-length table); written by scroll routines

symbols.name: VDP_regs_cache
symbols.description: shadow copy of all VDP register words (16 words, R0-R15)

symbols.name: Possessed_items_list
symbols.description: .b[20] item ID array (up to 20 items); length in Possessed_items_length

symbols.name: Possessed_magics_list
symbols.description: .b[30] magic ID array (up to 30 spells); length in Possessed_magics_length

symbols.name: Possessed_equipment_list
symbols.description: .b[14] equipment ID array (up to 14 items); length in Possessed_equipment_length

symbols.name: Shop_item_list
symbols.description: .b[16] current shop's item ID list (loaded at shop entry)

symbols.name: Equipped_unused
symbols.description: — Probably unused, at least

symbols.name: Ready_equipment_list
symbols.description: .b[24] equipment IDs available for readying in the equipment menu

symbols.name: Towns_visited
symbols.description: .b[16] visited flag per town (non-zero = visited); indexed by TOWN_xxx

symbols.name: Ending_player_name_buffer
symbols.description: .b[6] copy of player name used during the ending credit sequence

symbols.name: Transaction_amount_end
symbols.description: sentinel address marking end of transaction data block

symbols.name: Enemy_position_indices
symbols.description: .b[8] slot-to-screen-position mapping for battle enemy layout

symbols.name: Boss_battle_flags
symbols.description: .b[32] boss-fight state flags; indices below

symbols.name: Map_trigger_flags
symbols.description: .b[~60] transient map/cutscene event trigger flags (not saved to SRAM)

symbols.name: VBlank_object_ptr
symbols.description: pointer to the VBlank object update routine (called each VBlank)

symbols.name: HBlank_object_ptr
symbols.description: pointer to the HBlank object update routine (called each HBlank)

symbols.name: Menu_object_ptr
symbols.description: pointer to the active menu/UI object update routine

symbols.name: Object_slot_base
symbols.description: object/entity slot pool base (14 slots × $E0 bytes each)

symbols.name: Object_table_base
symbols.description: object table array base (entries reference slot pool)

symbols.name: Sprite_attr_buffer
symbols.description: unsorted OAM entries; each entry is 8 bytes (Y, size/link, tile, X)

symbols.name: Sprite_sort_buffer
symbols.description: intermediate sort workspace used by SortAndUploadSpriteOAM

symbols.name: Sprite_sort_temp_buffer
symbols.description: final sorted OAM list written by SortAndUploadSpriteOAM

symbols.name: Sprite_priority_slots
symbols.description: 256 priority buckets × 16 bytes; used to sort sprites by draw order

symbols.name: Ram_clear_end
symbols.description: sentinel: top of general RAM clear region (before stack gap at $FFFFFE00)
